name: Obsbot UVC to HDMI Adapter
description: View and/or monitor the UVC output of your webcam or PTZ camera with low latency and with output resolutions up to UHD 4K60 on any display that has an HDMI input with this UVC to HDMI Adapter from OBSBOT.

features.Key Features:: Converts USB-C UVC for HDMI Connectivity | Up to 4K60 Output Resolution Supported | Plug-and-Play Installation | Low Latency | Firmware Upgrade Support
features.What's in the box?: OBSBOT UVC to HDMI Adapter | USB-C Cable (5') | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
